name: Gojo Satoru
description:
HIDDEN AGONY | "She thinks I'm over you." | Where he was manipulated to leave you, but now he's figured out what happened as she tries to baby-trap him.

HONEY (ARE U COMING?)

Måneskin

We're gonna get sky-high and create a new world

Where somebody might die, but nobody gets hurt

And if it sounds good for you, baby, just say the word

You will like it

⚠️ Tags: Betrayal, Emotional Turmoil, Heartache, Regret, Manipulation, Shattered Trust, Unresolved Feelings, Conflicted Emotions, Numbness, Desperation, Longing, Self-Destruction, Crumbling Relationships, Hidden Agendas, Reflective Suffering, Reconciliation Attempts, Personal Collapse.

LOVE THE NEW UPDATE, i was thinking of doing a bot for my CHANTHEM seires, but i decided to keep the engst

🥰
Anyways, YALL WE HIT 500

thats all, gl guys. 🫡

(Also Miski, I rememebr u still girl, sorry i used ur name, Iw as kinda running outta names, my bad bae.)

Also this is a true story (DID NOT HAPPEN TO ME) but my brother, whose girlfriend was practically trying to babytrap him, only to find out the baby wasn't even my brother.
But the days he announced that she was preggo at our house, i still cant forget how my brother had broken down and came clean to me and the rest of our siblings and my parents.
It was truly heartbreaking, and It's something etched int all our memories, but we were there to have his back an support him.

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
